name: X-Golf Mequon
address: 11043 N Port Washington Rd, Mequon, WI 53092
about: X-Golf Mequon operates an indoor golf facility featuring 7 state-of-the-art simulators. The venue provides a comprehensive experience that combines golf simulation, training, and entertainment. Pricing is structured per bay, per hour, with rates of $40 for Monday-Thursday and Friday before 4pm, and $60 for Friday after 4pm, Saturday, and Sunday. Each bay accommodates up to 6 people and it is recommended to allow 1 hour per person to play 18 holes. The facility encourages advance booking due to high demand during peak times.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled simulator accuracy using camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Comprehensive food and drink options including a full bar with craft beer and cocktails
Versatile space suitable for both casual play and serious training sessions

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen serving shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas
Full liquor bar with craft beer, cocktails, and wine available by the glass or on tap

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art system combining camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, as it's highly recommended. Rental clubs may be available but their availability is not guaranteed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site restaurant and bar serving food and drinks. BYOB is not mentioned as an option.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each individual can finish 18 holes in about one hour. For multiple players, it takes approximately 1 hour per person added to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages and offers junior golf lessons for ages 15 and under.
